evidence.claim: Used Elasticsearch, Hugging Face Transformers, BentoML, MLflow, Embeddings, Python, OpenSearch, GANs, LoRA, Sentence Transformers, OpenCV, Computer Vision, Reinforcement Learning, and Information Retrieval
evidence.source_text: Skills: Elasticsearch (expert, 63mo, 15 endorsements); Hugging Face Transformers (advanced, 59mo, 26 endorsements); BentoML (advanced, 21mo, 46 endorsements); MLflow (intermediate, 35mo, 14 endorsements); Embeddings (expert, 50mo, 12 endorsements); Recommendation Systems (expert, 40mo, 33 endorsements); Machine Learning (expert, 62mo, 59 endorsements); Python (expert, 62mo, 59 endorsements); NLP (expert, 56mo, 19 endorsements); Excel (beginner, 13mo, 2 endorsements); OpenSearch (advanced, 39mo, 57 endorsements); GANs (intermediate, 13mo, 5 endorsements); LoRA (expert, 74mo, 33 endorsements); Sentence Transformers (expert, 53mo, 50 endorsements); Information Retrieval (expert, 96mo, 51 endorsements); OpenCV (intermediate, 35mo, 8 endorsements); Computer Vision (intermediate, 11mo, 15 endorsements); Reinforcement Learning (intermediate, 32mo, 8 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% for a 500K document knowledge base at InMobi
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents... Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Acted as de-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems and production load experience
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.
